title: REDEFINE Braided Stretchy Adjustable Watch Band for Apple Watch S1 S2 S3 (38mm) / S4 S5 S6 SE (40mm) / S7 S8 S9 (41mm) / S10 S11 (42mm)
description:
Brand:
REDEFINE
Material:
Elastic Braided Nylon
Compatibility:
Work with all types of Apple Watch S1 S2 S3 (38mm) / S4 S5 S6 SE (40mm) / S7 S8 S9 (41mm) / S10 S11 (42mm)
Features:
- Braided Stretch band is woven from high-quality recycled polyamide material, which is soft, breathable, stretchable, durable, lightweight and washable, comfortable to wear, and skin-friendly without any irritation.
- Adopt adjustable stainless steel metal buckle design, easily slide adjust to fit your wrist.
- The watch lugs on both ends, can lock onto your iWatch securely and precisely. Easily direct installation and one button removal, very convenient and fast.
Note:
Actual product colors may vary slightly from photos due to lighting used in photo shoots or different monitor settings.
Package Included:
1 x Watch Band for Apple Watch (Watch not included)
Compatibility
Apple Watch 38mm / 40mm / 41mm
Specifications

title: REDEFINE Stretchy Nylon Watch Band for Apple Watch S1 S2 S3 (38mm) / S4 S5 S6 SE (40mm) / S7 S8 S9 (41mm) / S10 S11 (42mm)
description:
Brand:
REDEFINE
Compatibility:
Work with all types ofApple Watch S1 S2 S3 (38mm) / S4 S5 S6 SE (40mm) / S7 S8 S9 (41mm) / S10 S11 (42mm)
Features:
Soft and Breathable Lightweight watch band:
Nylon is a naturally cooling material, skin-friendly and breathable, if you wear the strap for a long time, it won’t cause any discomfort to your skin. Super lightweight, only 10g/0.31 Oz, saves you from other heavier bands and is great to use while doing sports activities, attending meetings, or other occasions.
Elastic Design and Adjustable Metal Buckles:
the upgraded elastic design, combine with adjustable metal buckles, allowing you to freely adjust the length to your best comfort level, is pretty stretchy, and won’t cause any discomfort or pressure to your wrist.
Easy Installation:
Simple design, No tool or special technique needed, interchange easily. The adapter is produced through a special craft technique, take off your watch band, then slide it into the watch band, and loosen or tighten it up with the metal buckle. it will fit snugly with your watch for as long as you want.
Note:
Actual product colors may vary slightly from photos due to lighting used in photo shoots or different monitor settings.
Package Included:
1 x Watch Band for Apple Watch (Watch not included)
Compatibility
Apple Watch 38mm / 40mm / 41mm
Specifications
